items.name: Tacdel Builder Story
items.description: Find compact builder-story moments with a clear setup, friction point, and practical payoff.
items.zoom_rule: No automatic face tracking; export vertical shorts with safe centered framing.
items.shorts_behavior: Generate several self-contained story candidates, not one final edit.
items.cta_preservation: Preserve CTAs only when they make the short self-contained.
items.planner_hint: Prioritize creator/building stories with a strong first sentence and concrete lesson.
